title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies (SAC-OT) – Announcement of Meeting – June 14, 2019 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies: Announcement of Meeting – June 14, 2019
Ottawa,  Ontario May 28, 2019
The purpose  of this Notice is to announce an upcoming meeting of Health Canada's Scientific  Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies (SAC-OT).
The advice  received from this meeting will be used to facilitate and enhance the pre- and  post-market review of tumour agnostic cancer treatments.

## Mandate  of the SAC-OT
The SAC-OT  will provide Health Canada with scientific, technical, medical and clinical  advice on the evaluation of safety, efficacy, and effectiveness regarding this  new therapeutic paradigm for treating cancer.
For more  details on the mandate of the SAC-OT, please refer to the Terms of Reference of the SAC-OT.
Health  Canada will present the regulatory review context while Canadian experts will  provide clinical and research perspectives in this area of advanced oncology  therapeutics. The SAC-OT will, in turn, address questions regarding tumor  agnostic therapies in relation to Health Canada’s review processes.
Upon  completion of the presentation and following discussion, the Committee will  deliberate before providing recommendations to Health Canada.
The  following topics regarding tumour agnostic cancer treatments will be discussed:
- current  pre-market regulatory requirements and its challenges
- post-market  considerations to develop suitable risk management plans and
- the  implications to traditional oncology practices and the healthcare system
A more  detailed agenda will be posted in the coming weeks.
